title: CV
description: Adrià Julià Lundgren — Senior Front-end Engineer. Barcelona.
body: **Barcelona / remote** - [ajl@xarop.com](mailto:ajl@xarop.com) - [linkedin.com/in/xarop](https://linkedin.com/in/xarop/) - [github.com/xarop](https://github.com/xarop) - [+34 620 58 26 26](https://wa.me/34620582626) # Adrià Julia Lundgren ## Try the profile - [**Senior Frontend Engineer** — React, TypeScript, Vite, Design Systems](./frontend-react/) - [**Design Engineer** — UI Systems, Figma, Design Tokens](./design-engineer/) - [**WordPress Architect** — Blocks, ACF, Twig/Timber, Performance](./wordpress-architect/) --- ##Senior Front-end Engineer Senior Engineer with more than 20 years of experience building high-performance digital ecosystems. Specialized in modern front-end architecture, UI/UX design, Figma and AI development assistance. ### Senior Web Engineer — xarop.com *(2019 – current)* - Zara Web Challenge: SPA with React 19 and Node.js / Express backend. - Custom development of WordPress / ACF notebooks for large clients. - Architecture of scalable design systems. ### Senior Front-end Engineer — Newshore *(2017 – 2020)* - Vueling Airlines: development of high traffic interfaces with modular components. ### Other featured roles - **Minsait / Fundació BBVA** — Web Components, LitElement. - **BeeData Analytics** — data visualization, REST APIs. - **Editorial Planeta** — web editorial platforms. - **SomMobilitat** — sustainable mobilitat, front-end. - **Telefónica I+D** — research and prototype. - **Vueling Airlines** — web interfaces. --- ## Training - **Postgraduate** in Multimèdia Programming — Pompeu Fabra University *(1999)* - **Grau** in Disseny Gràfic — EAAOA Llotja *(1994)* - **Technician** in Multimèdia Tractament — ITES *(1996)* --- ## Languages - **Català** — natiu. - **Castellà** — natiu. - **Anglès** — professional. --- CV complete to [cv.xarop.com](https://xarop.com/cv) Write to me at [ajl@xarop.com](mailto:ajl@xarop.com)
